meaning: n.小村,部落n.哈姆雷特(Hamlet,莎士比亚著名悲剧剧名)
examples: The critics raved about his performance in 'Hamlet'.
The local dramatic society is doing 'Hamlet' next month.
Our new production of 'Hamlet' is currently in rehearsal.
Water taxis can be caught from the hamlet of Marahau, about 70km northwest of Nelson.
While over the hamlet of Hanksville, Utah, I will turn northeast and fly toward Moab.
